note: Data published Fridays 3:30 PM ET; covers Tuesday positions. ~3-day lag.

composite.crowding_risk_note: No extreme crowding detected across energy contracts.
composite.market_context: CFTC positioning is a sentiment/flow indicator, not a fundamental driver. Crowded positioning amplifies price moves — it does not cause them. Most powerful when combined with physical signals: Cushing draw + crowded long = unsustainable; Cushing draw + crowded short = short-squeeze setup.
